case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ANDREW RENSHAW BAIL BONDS et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREW RENSHAW BAIL BONDS NATIONAL AMERICAN INS. CO. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW RENSHAW BAIL BONDS NATIONAL AMERICAN INS. CO.
REIMBURSEMENT FOR FILING RE-6103.5 GOV.CODE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
